widget.name: EdtsCheckBox
widget.description: Custom checkbox widget that supports either a single boolean value or multiple selections from an array-like datasource.

property.caption: Mode
property.description: Choose between one boolean checkbox or a checkbox group backed by a reference set.

property.caption: Boolean Attribute
property.description: Boolean attribute used when the widget is in Boolean mode.

property.caption: Reference Set
property.description: Reference set association used to store selected objects in Array mode.

property.caption: Options Source
property.description: Datasource that provides the selectable checkbox items in Array mode.

property.caption: Option Label
property.description: Attribute shown as the label for each checkbox item.

property.caption: Option Description
property.description: Optional attribute shown below each option label in Array mode.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional label shown above the checkbox or checkbox group.

property.caption: Boolean Caption
property.description: Caption shown next to the checkbox in Boolean mode.

property.caption: Boolean Description
property.description: Optional helper text shown under the boolean checkbox caption.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the widget.

property.caption: Layout
property.description: Choose whether checkbox items are stacked vertically or shown inline.

property.caption: Appearance
property.description: Choose whether items use a boxed card style or a simple inline checkbox style.

property.caption: Required
property.description: Require the boolean checkbox to be checked, or at least one array option to be selected.

property.caption: Required Message
property.description: Validation message shown when the required rule fails.

property.caption: Validate On Change
property.description: Show validation feedback while the user interacts with the widget.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optional action executed after the selection changes.
